catalog.blurb: eliza-1-2B - smallest/entry local tier for low-memory phones and CPU fallback.
eliza-1-4B - balanced local tier for modern laptops and desktops.
eliza-1-9B - workstation local tier for stronger reasoning.
eliza-1-27B - high-quality local tier for GPU workstations.
eliza-1-27B-256k - long-context local tier for high-memory GPU workstations.

tier.topRecommendation: Use cloud mode. Local responses will be very slow on this device.

providers.label: Eliza-1 local runtime
providers.description: On-device Eliza-1 inference with the optimized local runtime. The bundle serves text, embeddings, TTS, and transcription from one local provider.

enableState.reason: Eliza-1 model installed; native local runtime available

providers.label: Paired device bridge
providers.description: Inference on a paired mobile or desktop device over WebSocket. Useful when the agent runs in a container but the model lives on your phone or laptop.

providers.label: eliza-1-2b runtime
providers.description: Runs Eliza-1 natively on iOS or Android via Capacitor. Only available in mobile builds.

providers.label: Claude subscription
providers.description: Claude Code task-agent access through linked accounts.

providers.label: Codex subscription
providers.description: Codex and ChatGPT subscription access through linked accounts.

providers.label: Gemini CLI subscription
providers.description: Gemini CLI task-agent access through linked accounts.

enableState.reason: No linked account; run gemini auth login

providers.label: z.ai Coding Plan
providers.description: GLM coding-plan access through linked z.ai Coding Plan accounts.

providers.label: Kimi Code
providers.description: Kimi coding-plan access through linked Kimi Code accounts.

providers.label: DeepSeek Coding Plan
providers.description: Unavailable until DeepSeek exposes a first-party coding subscription flow that can be integrated without API-key substitution.

enableState.reason: Unavailable: no first-party coding subscription integration

providers.label: Eliza Cloud
providers.description: Eliza-hosted inference routed through your subscription. No API key to manage.

providers.label: Anthropic API
providers.description: Claude models via the Anthropic API. Requires an API key.

providers.label: OpenAI API
providers.description: GPT models via the OpenAI API. Requires an API key.

providers.label: DeepSeek API
providers.description: DeepSeek models via API key or linked account pool.

enableState.reason: No API key or linked account

providers.label: z.ai API
providers.description: GLM models via z.ai API key or linked account pool.

enableState.reason: No API key or linked account

providers.label: NEAR AI Cloud
providers.description: TEE-backed private inference via NEAR AI Cloud. Requires an API key.

providers.label: Kimi / Moonshot API
providers.description: Kimi models via Moonshot API key or linked account pool.

enableState.reason: No API key or linked account

providers.label: Google (Gemini)
providers.description: Gemini models via Google Generative AI. Requires an API key.

providers.label: Grok API
providers.description: xAI Grok models. Requires an API key.

providers.label: Mistral API
providers.description: Mistral models via la Plateforme. Requires an API key.
